Title: Intake and Document Normalization
AcceptanceCriteria: Users can upload TXT resumes and TXT requirement documents end to end

Title: AI Extraction and Matching
AcceptanceCriteria: System extracts skills and returns ranked recommendations

Title: Recruiter Review and Rationale
AcceptanceCriteria: Recruiters can review rationale and record final decisions

Title: Telemetry Security and Operations
AcceptanceCriteria: Telemetry security and monitoring are active

Title: Resume Upload
AcceptanceCriteria: Allow internal employees to upload UTF-8 TXT resumes up to 1 MB

Title: Requirement Document Upload
AcceptanceCriteria: Allow recruiters or requestors to upload UTF-8 TXT requirements up to 1 MB

Title: Input Validation and Storage
AcceptanceCriteria: Validate type encoding and size before processing

Title: Resume Skill Extraction
AcceptanceCriteria: Extract and persist skills from uploaded resumes

Title: Requirement Text Parsing
AcceptanceCriteria: Normalize requirement TXT content for matching

Title: Candidate-to-Requirement Matching
AcceptanceCriteria: Generate ranked top-5 recommendations

Title: Review Recommendations
AcceptanceCriteria: Display ranked candidates with decision actions

Title: Recommendation Rationale
AcceptanceCriteria: Display rationale confidence and skill gaps

Title: Decision Capture
AcceptanceCriteria: Persist recruiter decisions with audit fields

Title: Event Telemetry
AcceptanceCriteria: Emit trace events with correlation IDs

Title: Access Control
AcceptanceCriteria: Enforce RBAC and audit denied access

Title: Latency and Availability Monitoring
AcceptanceCriteria: Expose p90 latency and weekly availability

Title: Cost Efficiency Tracking
AcceptanceCriteria: Report average tokens and estimated weekly cost

Title: Upload TXT Resume
AcceptanceCriteria: Given UTF-8 TXT <= 1 MB upload then store and set Ready for processing within 30 seconds

Title: Upload Requirement TXT
AcceptanceCriteria: Given UTF-8 TXT <= 1 MB upload then store and set Ready for matching

Title: Enforce Input Validation
AcceptanceCriteria: Invalid type encoding or oversize files are rejected with explicit message and no processing job

Title: Extract Skills from Resume
AcceptanceCriteria: Given Ready for processing resume extract and persist skills with timestamp and source resume id

Title: Parse Requirement Text
AcceptanceCriteria: Given Ready for matching requirement parse and persist normalized terms linked to request id

Title: Generate Top-5 Ranked Recommendations
AcceptanceCriteria: Given extracted skills and parsed requirements return unique top-5 list in descending score order

Title: Review Ranked Candidates
AcceptanceCriteria: Given completed match display candidate name rank score and matched skills

Title: View Recommendation Rationale
AcceptanceCriteria: Given recommendation entry show matched skills missing critical skills and confidence signal

Title: Save Recruiter Decision with Audit Fields
AcceptanceCriteria: Given recruiter decision persist decision rationale reviewer id and timestamp

Title: Emit End-to-End Trace Events
AcceptanceCriteria: Each upload extraction match and review action emits one trace event with correlation id

Title: Enforce RBAC and Audit Denials
AcceptanceCriteria: Unauthorized access returns HTTP 403 and writes audit event

Title: Track Latency and Availability
AcceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows processing p90 latency and weekly availability

Title: Track TXT Processing Cost
AcceptanceCriteria: Weekly metrics include average tokens per requirement and estimated processing cost
